raw.message:
Summer is here, and so is the heat 🥵
Make the outside temperature match your outfit with the Phoenixtra X-Suit! Share your hottest killstreak with the Phoenixtra X-Suit in the comments!
#PUBGMOBILE #PUBGM #PUBGMXSUIT430

hook.summary: Meme-style static image with a caption about matching outfits to the temperature.
hook.visual_action: A static 3D render of a female character in golden armor with fire effects zooms in slowly.
hook.text_overlay: WHEN YOU WANT YOUR OUTFIT TO MATCH THE TEMPERATURE OUTSIDE

scene_flow: Display of a meme-style frame with a caption about matching outfits to the temperature.
Slow camera zoom into a high-fidelity 3D render of a female character in golden armor.
The character stands amidst a background of fire, emphasizing the 'hot' theme.
on_screen_text: WHEN YOU WANT YOUR OUTFIT TO MATCH THE TEMPERATURE OUTSIDE
audience_proxy: Competitive mobile gamers interested in exclusive character cosmetics and internet humor.
